title: L&D Training Effectiveness Report - AWS Cloud Architecture & Services
executiveSummary: The selected scope contains 1 course(s), 1 completed course(s), and 12 trainee-course records. Overall attendance is 93.3%, completion is 100%, pass rate is 83.3%, and average score is 7.32/10. Total training hours are 224 and scaled cost is 11. Overall effectiveness classification is Risk. Management interpretation: The training course 'AWS Cloud Architecture & Services' has achieved a completion rate of 100% with an overall attendance rate of 93.3%. However, the pass rate of 83.3% indicates that a portion of trainees did not meet the expected performance standards, leading to an overall effectiveness classification of Risk.
insights: AWS Cloud Architecture & Services has an effectiveness score of 85.76 in the selected scope.
2 outstanding trainees met the star learner rule: score >= 9.0 and full attendance.
2 high-priority L&D NORM flags were triggered.

The average score of 7.32 out of 10 and a feedback rating of 4.71 out of 5 suggest that while trainees found the course valuable, there are still concerns regarding individual performance, as indicated by the need for 1:1 support for two trainees.
The total training hours amounted to 224, with a scaled cost of 11, resulting in a low ROI proxy of 0.024.
recommendations: Assign a coaching owner, buddy support, and targeted practice resources for the flagged learner.
Additionally, a review of course content may be warranted to enhance overall effectiveness and address the identified risk classification.

checklist.detail: Required sheets and columns were mapped from Teams, OneDrive, Forms, KPI, Rules and Template sources.
Expected attendance rows are trainee count x total sessions. Late is retained for metrics as partial attendance.
Completed courses require one valid assessment and pass-status row per trainee.
NORM-14 requires at least 60% feedback response rate for valid analysis.
Duplicate rows and numeric ranges were checked before metric generation.

checklist.check: Consistency: course ID and pass-status logic
checklist.detail: Cross-source course IDs and pass-status logic were checked against the selected course catalog.
